headlines.title: Three adults dead in shooting at San Diego Islamic Center, police chief says
headlines.description: San Diego Police Chief Scott Wahl announced five people were killed at the Islamic Center of San Diego, including two suspected shooters and three adults. Wahl added that school teachers, students and staff are safe.

headlines.title: Justice Department sets up 'anti-weaponization fund' after Trump drops IRS lawsuit
headlines.description: The Justice Department announced that President Trump would be dropping his lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service in "exchange" for the creation of an "anti-weaponization fund." NBC News' Monica Alba reports on the announcement and how the fund could be used.

headlines.title: High-Stakes Primary Elections Test Trump’s Influence of GOP
headlines.description: It is a high stakes political week for President Donald Trump with primary elections that could indicate the future of the Republican party. A key test for Trump’s power is coming up in Kentucky. The Iran war has become a central political issue for Trump and Democrats argue voters will express their frustration at the ballot box. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Mark Fuhrman, former LAPD detective who investigated O.J. Simpson, is dead
headlines.description: Mark Fuhrman, the former Los Angeles Police detective who became infamous as one of the leads investigating O.J.

headlines.title: CDC confirms one American working in Congo tested positive for Ebola
headlines.description: The CDC confirmed one American who was working in Congo tested positive for Ebola after becoming symptomatic. A CDC spokesman said the person and other high-risk contacts will be moved to Germany for treatment and monitoring. NBC News medical reporter Dr. Akshay Syal has details on the announcement.

headlines.title: Trump says an attack on Iran planned for Tuesday is called off
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said he is calling off an attack on Iran planned for Tuesday because regional leaders had urged him to allow negotiations to continue and a “very acceptable” deal for the U.S. was at hand.

headlines.title: ICE officer charged with four counts of assault in Minnesota shooting of Venezuelan immigrant
headlines.description: An ICE officer who shot a Venezuelan man and is accused by Minnesota prosecutors of lying about the incident was charged with assault and falsely reporting a crime in Minnesota on Monday.

headlines.title: Amid prospect of ICE at World Cup games, vendors weigh livelihoods against safety
headlines.description: Vendors in and around SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, Calif., have expressed fear as the Trump administration has signaled ICE will help provide security for the World Cup.

headlines.title: Humanitarian parole denied for deported parents of U.S. citizen girl with rare brain tumor
headlines.description: In Mexico, the girl’s condition has worsened and she’s not getting the specialized care she needs, her family said in an exclusive interview with NBC News.

headlines.title: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman
headlines.description: A jury in California tossed Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman after determining Musk waited too long to bring the lawsuit forward.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: News organizations sue to unseal filings in DOJ’s Fulton County election investigation
headlines.description: A group of news organizations, including NBC News, has filed a motion to unseal filings and subpoenas in the Department of Justice’s ongoing investigation into the 2020 election in Fulton County, Georgia.
